name: option_a_current_review.csv
text:
id | title | source_organization | source_url | current_category | status_observed | keep_status | primary_issue | recommended_replacement_id | proposed_track | strong_for | notes
A01 | Information Security Policy - Northwestern University | Northwestern University | https://policies.northwestern.edu/docs/information-security-policy.pdf | Policies / Governance | opens | keep_with_annotation | Document is structurally strong, but published PDF shows effective date 2022-01-01 and next review date January 2023; use as real-world policy example, not as current best-practice reference. |  | policy_and_governance | grounded_qa;policy_review;benchmark_realism | Good policy anatomy and governance language; annotate stale review metadata in manifest.
A02 | Retention of University Records - Cornell University | Cornell University | https://policy.cornell.edu/sites/default/files/vol4_7.pdf | Policies / Governance | opens | keep |  |  | policy_and_governance | grounded_qa;policy_review;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism | Excellent real-world retention schedule; updated 2026 in current PDF.
A03 | Code of Conduct - University of Minnesota | University of Minnesota | https://regents.umn.edu/sites/regents.umn.edu/files/2024-05/policy_code_of_conduct.pdf | Policies / Governance | opens | optional_reserve | Credible public governance document but last amended in 2006 and less aligned to EvidenceOps than vendor/security artifacts. | PA-019 | policy_and_governance | grounded_qa;benchmark_realism;reference_only | Keep as reserve if you want governance diversity; do not treat as high-priority benchmark doc.
A04 | Supplier Code of Conduct - Northeastern University | Northeastern University | https://finance.northeastern.edu/wp-content/uploads/Supplier-Code-of-Conduct_website_March-2024.pdf | Policies / Governance | opens | keep |  |  | policy_and_governance | policy_review;risk_review;benchmark_realism | Useful supplier-governance artifact with conflict, gifts, and ethical conduct provisions.
A05 | NIST Cybersecurity Framework Version 1.1 | NIST | https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/CSWP/NIST.CSWP.04162018.pdf | Policies / Governance | opens | keep_reclassify | Great historical version pair, but this is a framework reference, not an internal policy. |  | reference_frameworks | policy_review;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism;reference_only | Move out of policies/governance and classify as reference framework version baseline.
A06 | NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 | NIST | https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/CSWP/NIST.CSWP.29.pdf | Policies / Governance | opens | keep_reclassify | Great authoritative reference, but belongs in reference_frameworks. |  | reference_frameworks | policy_review;checklist_generation;risk_review;reference_only | Use with CSF 1.1 as explicit version pair for change detection and control mapping.
A07 | World Bank Standard Procurement Document - Request for Proposals (Consulting Services) | World Bank | https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/399371577997897818-0290022019/render/SPDRequestforProposalsConsultantsPREESFDecember2019.pdf | Contracts / Procurement | opens | keep |  |  | contracts_and_procurement | grounded_qa;clause_extraction;contract_review;benchmark_realism | Long-form procurement artifact with realistic sectioning and annex structure.
A08 | Common Paper Professional Services Agreement | Common Paper | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/PSA/main/psa.md | Contracts / Procurement | opens | keep_with_annotation | High semantic value, but raw markdown is weak for layout/OCR benchmarks. |  | contracts_and_procurement | clause_extraction;contract_review;risk_review | Use for semantic contract review; pre-normalize line breaks in ingestion.
A09 | Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement | Common Paper | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/CSA/main/CSA.md | Contracts / Procurement | opens | keep_with_annotation | Raw markdown format reduces visual-document realism. |  | contracts_and_procurement | clause_extraction;contract_review;risk_review | Very useful SaaS agreement content; weaker for layout benchmark.
A10 | Common Paper Service Level Agreement | Common Paper | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/SLA/main/sla.md | Contracts / Procurement | opens | keep_with_annotation | Raw markdown and compact text reduce page-level realism. |  | contracts_and_procurement | clause_extraction;contract_review;reference_only | Still valuable for SLA term extraction.
A11 | Common Paper Data Processing Agreement | Common Paper | https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CommonPaper/DPA/main/DPA.md | Contracts / Procurement | opens | keep_with_annotation | Raw markdown reduces layout realism but content is useful. |  | contracts_and_procurement | clause_extraction;contract_review;risk_review | Good privacy/security addendum reference.
A12 | CMS Sample Checklists for Conducting Internal Monitoring and Auditing | Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services | https://www.cms.gov/files/document/ehrinternalmonitoringja062816pdf | Audit / Evidence | opens | keep_with_annotation | Strong checklist mechanics, but healthcare/EHR scope is domain-specific. |  | audit_and_monitoring | grounded_qa;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism | Useful as real checklist artifact; annotate domain specificity.
A13 | LANL Subcontractor Nonconformance Report (NCR) | Los Alamos National Laboratory | https://cdn.lanl.gov/files/2276--2_f5aa0.pdf | Audit / Evidence | opens | keep |  |  | incident_and_action_tracking | grounded_qa;clause_extraction;risk_review;benchmark_realism | Excellent real NCR form for nonconformance workflows.
A14 | CBIAC Meeting Summary and Action Items | City of Charlotte | https://www.charlottenc.gov/files/sharedassets/city/v/1/growth-and-development/documents/cbi/meeting-agendas-and-minutes/cbiac-september-10-2025-meeting-summary-and-action-items.pdf | Audit / Evidence | opens | keep_with_annotation | Good action-item document, but extraction quality is imperfect and the content is municipal/program specific. |  | incident_and_action_tracking | grounded_qa;owner_deadline_extraction;benchmark_realism | Keep because it has explicit assigned actions and due dates.
A15 | Board Meeting Approved Minutes Template | State of Nevada | https://red.nv.gov/uploadedFiles/rednvgov/Content/CIC/Program_Training/Flowcharts/Board-Meeting-Approved-Minutes-Template.pdf | Reference Templates | problematic | replace | Search result exists, but direct open returned an access/rejection response in review; do not leave it unannotated. | PA-018 | reference_templates | reference_only | Replace with a directly accessible official template.
B01 | OSHA Safety and Health Program Audit Tool | OSHA | https://www.osha.gov/sites/default/files/SHP_Audit_Tool.pdf | Bonus Extras | opens | promote_to_core |  |  | audit_and_monitoring | checklist_generation;grounded_qa;benchmark_realism | Should move from bonus to core.
B02 | OSHA Near Miss Report Form | OSHA | https://www.osha.gov/sites/default/files/2021-07/Template%20for%20Near%20Miss%20Report%20Form.pdf | Bonus Extras | opens | promote_to_core |  |  | incident_and_action_tracking | grounded_qa;checklist_generation;benchmark_realism | Good incident/near-miss form; should move from bonus to core.
